title: PERIA: Perceive, Reason, Imagine, Act via Holistic Language and Vision Planning for Manipulation
title_zh: PERIA：通过整体语言与视觉规划实现感知、推理、想象与操作
abstract: Long-horizon manipulation tasks with general instructions often implicitly encapsulate multiple sub-tasks, posing significant challenges in instruction following. While language planning is a common approach to decompose general instructions into stepwise sub-instructions, text-only guidance may lack expressiveness and lead to potential ambiguity. Considering that humans often imagine and visualize sub-instructions reasoning out before acting, the imagined subgoal images can provide more intuitive guidance and enhance the reliability of decomposition. Inspired by this, we propose PERIA ( PErceive, Reason, Imagine, Act ), a novel framework that integrates holistic language planning and vision planning for long-horizon manipulation tasks with complex instructions, leveraging both logical and intuitive aspects of task decomposition. Specifically, we first perform a lightweight multi-modal alignment on the encoding side to empower the MLLM to perceive visual details and language instructions. The MLLM is then jointly instruction-tuned with a pretrained image-editing model to unlock capabilities of simultaneous reasoning of language instructions and generation of imagined subgoals. Furthermore, we introduce a consistency alignment loss to encourage coherent subgoal images and align with their corresponding instructions, mitigating potential hallucinations and semantic conflicts between the two planning manners. Comprehensive evaluations across three task domains demonstrate that PERIA, benefiting from holistic language and vision planning, significantly outperforms competitive baselines in both instruction following accuracy and task success rate on complex manipulation tasks. The details and visualizations are available at the homepage.
abstract_zh: 长时域操作任务通常隐含多个子任务，给指令跟随带来挑战。语言规划虽能分解指令，但纯文本指导缺乏表现力且易产生歧义。受人类在行动前想象子目标图像的启发，我们提出PERIA框架，整合语言与视觉规划，利用逻辑与直觉两方面进行任务分解。具体地，首先在编码端进行轻量多模态对齐，使多模态大语言模型（MLLM）感知视觉细节与语言指令；然后联合微调MLLM与预训练图像编辑模型，使其同时具备语言推理与想象子目标生成能力；此外引入一致性对齐损失，确保子目标图像连贯且与对应指令一致，缓解两种规划间的幻觉与语义冲突。在三个任务域上的全面评估表明，PERIA在复杂操作任务的指令跟随准确率和任务成功率上显著优于强基线。
tldr_zh: 提出PERIA框架，结合语言与视觉规划提升长时域操作任务的指令跟随能力。
cover_zh: 机器人也能边想边做？｜新框架让长任务操作准确率飙升

Title: "PERIA: Perceive, Reason, Imagine, Act via Holistic Language and Vision Planning for Manipulation"

>[!abstract] 一句话总结：提出PERIA框架，整合语言规划和视觉规划：先进行轻量多模态对齐增强MLLM感知，再联合微调MLLM与图像编辑模型，实现推理同时生成子目标图像，并使用一致性对齐损失减少幻觉和语义冲突。


# 一、动机

> 长期操作任务中，文本规划缺乏表现力，容易导致歧义，人类常通过想象子目标图像来辅助分解任务。


# 二、方法

> 提出PERIA框架，整合语言规划和视觉规划：先进行轻量多模态对齐增强MLLM感知，再联合微调MLLM与图像编辑模型，实现推理同时生成子目标图像，并使用一致性对齐损失减少幻觉和语义冲突。


# 三、核心实验结果

> 在三个任务域上，PERIA的指令跟随准确率和任务成功率显著优于竞争基线（具体数值未在摘要中给出）。


# 四、对我的启发

> 视觉规划为语言规划提供直观补充，但需对齐损失来保证子目标图像与指令的一致性，未来可探索更高效的图像编辑模型或真实机器人部署。
